backstory.original: Halsin, the esteemed Archdruid of the Emerald Grove, is a wise and powerful elf dedicated to the protection and preservation of nature. After being captured by goblins allied with the Absolute, he escaped and now fights to protect his grove and its inhabitants from this encroaching evil. He channels his deep connection to the natural world to aid his allies in their quests.
backstory.display: 翠绿林地的大德鲁伊哈尔辛深受他人尊崇。他是一位智慧而强大的精灵，致力于保护和维系大自然。他在被那些与真神结盟的地精俘虏后设法逃脱，并为保护他的林地及其居民免遭邪恶力量侵袭而战斗。他利用自己与自然界的深厚联系，帮助盟友们完成任务。

description.original: Halsin attacks the enemy with the most health for one hit, pulling them a short distance.
description.display: 哈尔辛攻击生命值最高的敌人，对其造成一次打击，并将其拉拽一小段距离。

longDescription.original: Halsin attacks the enemy with the most health, dealing one hit and pulling them a short distance towards the formation.
longDescription.display: 哈尔辛攻击生命值最高的敌人，对其造成一次打击，并将其拉向阵型一小段距离。

description.original: Halsin transforms into a bear for 20 seconds.
description.display: 哈尔辛变身成熊，持续 20 秒。

longDescription.original: Halsin transforms into a bear for 20 seconds and his base attack changes to Bear Strike.
longDescription.display: 哈尔辛变身成熊，持续 20 秒，并且他的基本攻击变为巨熊打击。

conditions.desc: Halsin gains a Harmony stack for each Good or Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champion in the formation, including himself. Halsin increases the damage of these Champions by $(amount)% for each Harmony stack, stacking multiplicatively.

Halsin gains a Harmony stack for each Good Champion in the formation, including himself. Halsin increases the damage of these Champions by $(amount)% for each Harmony stack, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位善良或中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士（包括哈尔辛自己），哈尔辛即获得一层“和谐”堆叠。哈尔辛每堆叠一层和谐，即可使这些勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
阵型中每有一位善良勇士（包括哈尔辛自己），哈尔辛即获得一层“和谐”堆叠。哈尔辛每堆叠一层和谐，即可使这些勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Halsin buffs good Champions, and these abilities improve as more good Champions are placed in the formation.
tipText.display: 哈尔辛为善良阵营勇士提供增益，并且随着阵型中善良阵营勇士的增加，这些能力会进一步提升。

description.desc: In non-boss areas, every time the area quest progresses there is a chance that you will just immediately complete the quest and move on to the next area. The maximum chance is $(amount)% if the quest is one away from being completed but is greatly reduced based on the number of quest items left to collect or enemies left to defeat.^^$halsin_guaranteed_instant_complete^^Current Chance: $halsin_chance_to_instant_complete%
在非首领区域的每次区域任务进度增长时，都有可能立即完成任务并进入下个区域。在任务只差一件任务物品或一次击杀就能完成时，最大几率为 $(amount)% ，该几率会根据任务剩余的物品收集数量或剩余的击败敌人数量而大幅降低。^^$halsin_guaranteed_instant_complete^^当前几率：$halsin_chance_to_instant_complete%

tipText.original: Halsin has a chance to complete area requirements early, advancing the Champions to the next area more rapidly.
tipText.display: 哈尔辛有机会提前完成区域要求，使勇士们更快进入下一个区域。

description.desc: Halsin heals Champions affected by Archdruid of Emerald Grove by $(amount) health every second.
哈尔辛每秒治疗受“翠绿林地的大德鲁伊”技能影响的勇士 $(amount) 生命值。

Halsin provides benefits based on the number of Harmony stacks he has.^3+ Harmony stacks: Nurturing: The effect of Nature's Revival is increased by $(amount___2)% for each Harmony stack he has, stacking additively.^5+ Harmony stacks: Hurrying: The effect of Call To Action is increased by $(amount___3)%.^7+ Harmony stacks: Recharging: When a Champion uses an Ultimate Attack, it recharges with $(amount___4)% of the cooldown already done.^9+ Harmony stacks: Growing: Increases the base value of Archdruid of Emerald Grove by $(amount___5)%.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: The effect of Nature's Revival is increased by 20% for each Harmony stack he has, stacking additively.
The effect of Call To Action is increased by 50%.
When a Champion uses an Ultimate Attack, it recharges with 10% of the cooldown already done.
Increases the base value of Archdruid of Emerald Grove by 400%.

description.desc: 哈尔辛根据他所拥有的和谐堆叠层数提供增益。^3+ 和谐堆叠层数：滋长：他拥有的每层和谐堆叠会使“大自然的复兴”的效果提高 $(amount___2)%，以加算方式堆叠。^5+ 和谐堆叠层数：疾行：“行动号召”的效果提高 $(amount___3)%。^7+ 和谐堆叠层数：充能：当一位勇士使用杀招攻击后，为该杀招恢复已冷却时间的 $(amount___4)%。^9+ 和谐堆叠层数：成长：“翠绿林地的大德鲁伊”的基础效果数值提高 $(amount___5)%。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 他拥有的每层和谐堆叠会使“大自然的复兴”的效果提高 20%，以加算方式堆叠。
当一位勇士使用杀招攻击后，为该杀招恢复已冷却时间的 10%。
“翠绿林地的大德鲁伊”的基础效果数值提高 400%。

description.desc: Unlocks Halsin's Bear Form Ultimate Attack
解锁哈尔辛的熊形态杀招攻击
Archdruid of Emerald Grove now also grants Harmony stacks for Neutral Champions in the formation (on the Good/Evil axis).
“翠绿林地的大德鲁伊”现在还会为阵型中的中立勇士（以善良/邪恶划分时）赋予“和谐”堆叠层数。

specializationDescription.original: Halsin channels the primal strength of the natural world, extending his support to embrace those who navigate beyond the struggle between good and evil.
specializationDescription.display: 哈尔辛引导大自然的原始力量，向那些超越善恶之争的英雄提供支持。

description.desc: Halsin increases the number of Ceremorphosis stacks the party has by $(amount)%, rounded down.^^Bonus Stacks: $(halsin_bonus_ceremorphosis_stacks amount)
哈尔辛使队伍拥有的蜕变层数增加 $(amount)%，向下取整。^^层数加成：$(halsin_bonus_ceremorphosis_stacks amount)

specializationDescription.original: Halsin's research into the tadpole epidemic is of great use to the foes of the Absolute.
specializationDescription.display: 哈尔辛对蝌蚪疫情的研究对抗击真神的敌人有极大帮助。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Archdruid of Emerald Grove by your maximum chance of Call To Action triggering.
提高“翠绿林地的大德鲁伊”的效果，使其有最大几率触发“行动号召”。

specializationDescription.original: Halsin increases the strength of his support depending on how strong his call to action is.
specializationDescription.display: 根据哈尔辛的号召对行动影响的强烈程度，他会增加他支援的强度。

description.original: Nature stands with you, my friend.
description.display: 大自然将与你同在，我的朋友。

description.original: There are no mistakes in nature; only hidden purpose.
description.display: 大自然没有错误，只有不为人知的目的。

description.original: Oak Father watch over your servant.
description.display: 橡树之父，请守护你的仆人。

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack effect of Halsin's Archdruid of Emerald Grove ability by $amount%.

description.original: I fight for the Oak Father's realm.
description.display: 我为橡树之父的领地而战。

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack effect of Halsin's Archdruid of Emerald Grove ability by $amount%.

description.original: Do not lose heart.
description.display: 不要灰心丧气。

description.original: Do not falter. Victory looms.
description.display: 不要动摇。我们胜利在望。

description.original: Nature's fury shall not be checked.
description.display: 大自然的怒火不可阻挡。

description.original: A healing touch is in order.
description.display: 接受我的疗愈触摸。

description.original: Silvanus, banish all wounds.
description.display: 西尔瓦努斯，请消除所有伤势。

description.original: Oak Father guide my hands.
description.display: 橡树之父将引导我的双手。

effects.description: Increases the healing of the Nurturing component of Halsin's Vow of Harmony ability by $amount%.

description.original: Let the Oak Father's strength flow through you.
description.display: 让橡树之父的力量流经你身。

effects.description: Increases the cooldown reduction of the Recharging component of Halsin's Vow of Harmony ability by $amount%.

description.original: The Oak Father's work is never done.
description.display: 橡树之父的工作永远不会结束。

effects.description: Increases the bonus of the Growing component of Halsin's Vow of Harmony ability by $amount%.

description.original: I give my all to serve the Oak Father. No sacrifice is too great.
description.display: 我将全心全意侍奉橡树之父。再大的牺牲也不为过。

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack effect of Halsin's Archdruid of Emerald Grove ability by $amount%.

description.original: Even those who defile nature inevitably return to it, in the end.
description.display: 即使是那些玷污自然的人，最终也避免不了要回归自然。

description.original: To serve and protect nature is a common bond that transcends all borders.
description.display: 服务并守护自然是超越一切界限的共同纽带。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each unique species in the formation, stacking additively.

description.original: Still serviceable as a walking stick.
description.display: 仍然能作为手杖使用。

description.original: As much a weapon as it is a symbol.
description.display: 既是一种武器，也是一种象征。

description.original: Wait long enough, and you'll notice the vines moving.
description.display: 只要你等待得够久，就会发现藤蔓在移动。

description.original: Faithwardens defend all of nature's bounty, at any cost.
description.display: 信仰守望者们不惜代价捍卫大自然的一切恩惠。

description.original: This keeps happening...
description.display: 总是这样……

description.original: It reminds me of sun, water, and fur.
description.display: 它让我想起太阳、水与毛皮。

description.original: Please pay no mind to the stains.
description.display: 请不要在意这些污渍。

description.original: The power of the bear lies within me.
description.display: 我身上寄宿着熊的力量。

description.original: This batch is harmless, but could still be studied.
description.display: 这一批是无害的，但仍然可以用于研究。

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack effect of Halsin's Archdruid of Emerald Grove ability by $amount%.

description.original: It promises a swift death. A mercy, perhaps.
description.display: 接触者会立即死亡。或许这也是一种仁慈。

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack effect of Halsin's Archdruid of Emerald Grove ability by $amount%.

description.original: May Silvanus guide my path, and lend me all his strength for what is to come.
description.display: 愿西尔瓦努斯指引我前进的道路，并将他的力量尽数转借于我，让我能够应对即将到来的一切。

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack effect of Halsin's Archdruid of Emerald Grove ability by $amount%.

description.original: Delightful! I shall see that this cub finds a proper home.
description.display: 太棒了！我会让这只幼崽找到一个合适的家。

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack effect of Halsin's Archdruid of Emerald Grove ability by $amount%.

description.original: I've walked through one too many briar patches in these.
description.display: 我穿着它走过了无数灌木丛。

description.original: These offer little protection, but I can feel the wind between my toes.
description.display: 这双鞋几乎起不到保护作用，但我能感觉到脚趾间的风。

description.original: These boots have seen much of nature's wonders.
description.display: 这双靴子见证了大自然的许多奇迹。

description.original: Nature does not yield.
description.display: 大自然是不会屈服的。

description.original: I should go foraging again soon.
description.display: 我得赶快再去找些吃的了。

description.original: Mugwort, balsam, rogue's morsel, and more. Everything I need.
description.display: 艾草、香脂、一点流浪时吃的食物，还有其他东西。我需要的东西都全了。

description.original: I wouldn't be much use as a healer without a few of these on hand.
description.display: 如果手头没有这些东西，我这个治疗师就没什么用了。

description.original: Omn kept this safely tucked away under a rock, waiting patiently for my return.
description.display: 奥姆把它安全地藏在一块石头下面，耐心地等待着我回来。

description.original: Its only magic was to bring a smile to a child who needed it.
description.display: 它唯一的魔力就是给需要它的孩子带来微笑。

description.original: All that remains of a certain goblin. Now to put it to better use.
description.display: 某个地精的全部遗骸。现在它们可以派上更好的用场了。

description.original: I've met many strange creatures in my time, but that ox was something else.
description.display: 我见过很多奇怪的生物，但那头牛与众不同。

description.original: What I would not give for a chunk of fresh honeycomb.
description.display: 要是能给我一大块新鲜的蜂巢，我什么都愿意做。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Nonbinary Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Elf Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a STR score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Good Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Halsin, the esteemed Archdruid of the Emerald Grove, is a wise and powerful elf dedicated to the protection and preservation of nature. After being captured by goblins allied with the Absolute, he escaped and now fights to protect his grove and its inhabitants from this encroaching evil. He channels his deep connection to the natural world to aid his allies in their quests.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Halsin is a Support, Healing, and Speed Champion who excels in formations with other Good Champions. He drives the Champions forward, potentially completing area quest requirements early, and his druidic healing keeps his allies alive.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 翠绿林地的大德鲁伊哈尔辛深受他人尊崇。他是一位智慧而强大的精灵，致力于保护和维系大自然。他在被那些与真神结盟的地精俘虏后设法逃脱，并为保护他的林地及其居民免遭邪恶力量侵袭而战斗。他利用自己与自然界的深厚联系，帮助盟友们完成任务。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 哈尔辛是一位支援、治疗及速度型勇士，擅长与其他善良勇士组成阵型。他能够激励勇士们前进，为他们创造提前满足区域任务需求的可能性，而他的德鲁伊治愈术能让盟友死里逃生。

original.description: Halsin attacks the enemy with the most health for one hit, pulling them a short distance.
original.long_description: Halsin attacks the enemy with the most health, dealing one hit and pulling them a short distance towards the formation.

original.description: Faithwardens defend all of nature's bounty, at any cost.

display.name: 白橡
display.description: 信仰守望者们不惜代价捍卫大自然的一切恩惠。

original.name: Outgrown Clothes
original.description: This keeps happening...

display.name: 穿不下的衣服
display.description: 总是这样……

original.name: Grove Garments
original.description: It reminds me of sun, water, and fur.

display.name: 树丛衣装
display.description: 它让我想起太阳、水与毛皮。

original.name: Druid Leather Armour
original.description: Please pay no mind to the stains.

display.name: 德鲁伊皮甲
display.description: 请不要在意这些污渍。

original.name: Armour of Moonbasking
original.description: The power of the bear lies within me.

display.name: 沐月护甲
display.description: 我身上寄宿着熊的力量。

original.name: Inert Venom
original.description: This batch is harmless, but could still be studied.

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack effect of Halsin's Archdruid of Emerald Grove ability by $amount%.

display.name: 惰性剧毒
display.description: 这一批是无害的，但仍然可以用于研究。

effects.description: 使哈尔辛的“翠绿林地的大德鲁伊”技能的堆叠前效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Wyvern Toxin
original.description: It promises a swift death. A mercy, perhaps.

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack effect of Halsin's Archdruid of Emerald Grove ability by $amount%.

display.name: 双足飞龙毒素
display.description: 接触者会立即死亡。或许这也是一种仁慈。

effects.description: 使哈尔辛的“翠绿林地的大德鲁伊”技能的堆叠前效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Halsin's Journals
original.description: May Silvanus guide my path, and lend me all his strength for what is to come.

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack effect of Halsin's Archdruid of Emerald Grove ability by $amount%.

display.name: 哈尔辛的日记
display.description: 愿西尔瓦努斯指引我前进的道路，并将他的力量尽数转借于我，让我能够应对即将到来的一切。

effects.description: 使哈尔辛的“翠绿林地的大德鲁伊”技能的堆叠前效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Stuffed Owlbear Toy
original.description: Delightful! I shall see that this cub finds a proper home.

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack effect of Halsin's Archdruid of Emerald Grove ability by $amount%.

display.name: 填充枭熊玩具
display.description: 太棒了！我会让这只幼崽找到一个合适的家。

effects.description: 使哈尔辛的“翠绿林地的大德鲁伊”技能的堆叠前效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Ruined Shoes
original.description: I've walked through one too many briar patches in these.

display.name: 破烂不堪的鞋子
display.description: 我穿着它走过了无数灌木丛。

original.name: Breezy Sandals
original.description: These offer little protection, but I can feel the wind between my toes.

display.name: 通风凉鞋
display.description: 这双鞋几乎起不到保护作用，但我能感觉到脚趾间的风。

original.name: Grovetender Boots
original.description: These boots have seen much of nature's wonders.

display.name: 树妖靴子
display.description: 这双靴子见证了大自然的许多奇迹。

original.name: Boots of Persistence
original.description: Nature does not yield.

display.name: 坚毅之靴
display.description: 大自然是不会屈服的。

original.name: Empty Pouch
original.description: I should go foraging again soon.

display.name: 空袋子
display.description: 我得赶快再去找些吃的了。

original.name: Alchemy Pouch
original.description: Mugwort, balsam, rogue's morsel, and more. Everything I need.

display.name: 炼金口袋
display.description: 艾草、香脂、一点流浪时吃的食物，还有其他东西。我需要的东西都全了。

original.name: Potions of Healing
original.description: I wouldn't be much use as a healer without a few of these on hand.

display.name: 治疗药剂
display.description: 如果手头没有这些东西，我这个治疗师就没什么用了。

original.name: Amulet of Silvanus
original.description: Omn kept this safely tucked away under a rock, waiting patiently for my return.

display.name: 西尔瓦努斯护身符
display.description: 奥姆把它安全地藏在一块石头下面，耐心地等待着我回来。

original.name: Ring of Resistance to Ants
original.description: Its only magic was to bring a smile to a child who needed it.

display.name: 防蚁指环
display.description: 它唯一的魔力就是给需要它的孩子带来微笑。

original.name: Crusher's Ring
original.description: All that remains of a certain goblin. Now to put it to better use.

display.name: 粉碎者之戒
display.description: 某个地精的全部遗骸。现在它们可以派上更好的用场了。

original.name: Shapeshifter's Boon Ring
original.description: I've met many strange creatures in my time, but that ox was something else.

display.name: 变形怪的祝福之戒
display.description: 我见过很多奇怪的生物，但那头牛与众不同。

original.name: Shapeshifter Hat
original.description: What I would not give for a chunk of fresh honeycomb.

display.name: 变形怪之帽
display.description: 要是能给我一大块新鲜的蜂巢，我什么都愿意做。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Nonbinary Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位非二元性别勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Elf Champions by $(amount)%
使所有精灵勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a STR score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有力量大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有体质大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Good Champions by $(amount)%
使所有善良阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
